creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #5)

drm-current-kmod

pkg info drm-current-kmod
drm-current-kmod-5.4.92.g20210526
Name           : drm-current-kmod
Version        : 5.4.92.g20210526
Installed on   : Wed Jun 30 09:11:26 2021 JST
Origin         : graphics/drm-current-kmod
Architecture   : FreeBSD:14:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : graphics kld
Licenses       : BSD2CLAUSE, MIT, GPLv2
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/
Comment        : DRM modules for the linuxkpi-based KMS components
Options        :
        DEBUG          : off
        SOURCE         : on
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1400024
Flat size      : 194MiB
Description    :
amdgpu, i915, and radeon DRM modules for the linuxkpi-based KMS components.
Currently corresponding to Linux 5.4.92 DRM.
This version is for FreeBSD CURRENT.
amdgpu and radeonkms are known to fail with EFI boot.

WWW: https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/

drm-current-kmod (Annotations : FreeBSD_version: 1400024) was installed by 'pkg install -f' on core-n247629.txt.[56].
And I made from ports and reinstalled drm-current-kmod on core-n247629.txt.7.
